views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing last night's sleep summary with duration and quality ring, current streak, weekly average bar chart, sleep debt indicator, and quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal with bedtime/wake time pickers that auto-calculate duration, a quality slider (1-5 stars), wake mood emoji picker, pre-sleep activity selector, dream toggle, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by sleep quality (red=poor, green=great), date-grouped entry list with duration bars, filtering by mood and quality range

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly trend lines for duration and quality, mood distribution pie chart, pre-sleep activity correlation analysis, best/worst sleep day breakdown, and AI-style insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntry
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most recent entry for today (or last night), nil if not yet logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastNightDurationHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sleep duration in hours computed from bedtime to wakeTime of the most recent entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average sleep duration in hours over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average quality rating (1-5) over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of consecutive days with a logged sleep entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sleepDebtHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Accumulated sleep deficit: sum of (goal - actual) for last 7 days, clamped to >= 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyDurationTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of this week's average duration vs previous week; positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyQualityTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of this week's average quality vs previous week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of sleep data formatted for bar/line chart overlay (duration bars + quality line)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of each wake mood over the last 30 days for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activityQualityCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average sleep quality grouped by pre-sleep activity to identify what helps/hurts sleep

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestSleepDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of week with the highest average quality rating over all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: consistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0-100 score based on bedtime standard deviation; lower variance = higher score

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last night's duration as a fraction of the daily sleep goal (0.0 to 1.0+)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insightMessages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of contextual insight strings: e.g. 'You sleep 45min longer after reading vs screen time', 'Your quality improved 12% this week'

dailyGoal.description: Target sleep duration in hours, adjustable in settings. Used for sleep debt calculation and progress ring.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if an entry exists with a wakeTime falling on that calendar day. Missing a single day resets the streak to zero.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare rolling 7-day average sleep duration and quality against the previous 7-day window. Also track 30-day bedtime consistency (standard deviation of bedtime hour). Flag weeks where average quality drops below 3.0 or duration drops below 6 hours.
insights: Activity correlation: compare average quality per pre-sleep activity and surface the best/worst (e.g. 'Meditation before bed gives you 0.8 higher quality than screen time')
Sleep debt warning: when cumulative 7-day debt exceeds 5 hours, show urgent recovery suggestion
Consistency insight: if bedtime std dev > 1.5 hours, suggest more regular schedule
Mood trend: if 3+ consecutive days of groggy/exhausted mood, flag potential issue
Weekend vs weekday: compare avg duration and surface oversleeping or undersleeping patterns
Quality streak: celebrate consecutive days with quality >= 4 (e.g. '5-day great sleep streak!')
Dream correlation: surface if dream recall correlates with higher quality ratings
Personal best: notify when weekly average duration or quality hits an all-time high
